content.question: The relationship between consolidation-induced school closure, teacher workforce redeployment, and pedagogical quality in surviving small schools is unknown; closing small grammar schools may displace experienced teachers or may improve efficiency.
content.reduction_path: Longitudinal administrative data on teacher movements, school staffing and pupil-to-teacher ratios pre- and post-consolidation, and value-added models of school quality in rural vs. urban surviving schools.
